# cloudless_clusters (Data Source)

List clusters available to the calling account. Optionally filter by region (country) / city / name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudless_clusters" "eu" {
  regions = ["DE", "PL"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `city_codes` (List of String)
- `names` (List of String)
- `regions` (List of String) ISO country codes; AND-composed with city_codes/names.

### Read-Only

- `clusters` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--clusters))

<a id="nestedatt--clusters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `clusters`

Read-Only:

- `city_code` (String)
- `dc_certifications` (List of String)
- `dc_id` (String)
- `dc_slug` (String)
- `dc_tier` (Number)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `region` (String)
